untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) price penetration below a support level (trend line or channel bottom) — requires dynamic support line tracking not available in indicator set; (2) recovery within 'a few bars' — requires lookback window logic and multi-bar pattern recognition; (3) identification of 'trend line or channel bottom' — requires support/resistance line fitting. Pivot points (s1) used as proxy for support but cannot capture the dynamic trend line or channel bottom concept. The pattern requires sequential bar analysis and support level derivation that exceeds available indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to use lower_wick (long shadow confirmation) and s1 pivot (support proxy) with close recovery logic, but the core signal depends on identifying and tracking dynamic support levels (trend lines/channels) which are not provided as indicators. Max bars to recover and penetration depth thresholds are also [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in original specification.
